<Badge text="apollo-connectors" variant="note" /> <Badge text="22 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> GraphQL client and tooling residual from `apollographql/skills`. Complements the existing server/federation curated row.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill apollo-client --skill rover --skill apollo-connectors -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/apollo-connectors`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/apollo-connectors.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill apollo-client --skill rover --skill apollo-connectors -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: GraphQL client and tooling residual from `apollographql/skills`. Complements the existing server/federation curated row.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Apollo Connectors — write schemas to integrate REST APIs into GraphQL using @source/@connect directives. Covers selection mapping, HTTP, vars ($args/$this/$config), entity batching, validation with rover. For connecting REST to supergraph.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill apollo-connectors -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named. Alternative: Claude plugin marketplace or gh skill install.

## Upstream Maintainer

apollographql (Apollo GraphQL org, github.com/apollographql/skills). MIT license. 11 skills total with SKILL.md + references/. Install via npx skills add, Claude Code plugin (namespaced), GitHub CLI gh skill (with pinning support), or direct. Experimental/reference project per disclaimer; community feedback welcome but not officially supported like core Apollo repos. Links to official Apollo docs (Client/Server/Federation/Connectors/Rover/iOS/MCP).

## Comparable Alternatives

apollo-federation, graphql-schema, rover (same); general REST/GraphQL gateway skills.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
